meta.label: DSA
meta.subject: dsa
meta.description: Restructured DSA learning, interview, and coding-practice dataset. Combined source headings were split into individual topics. Practical prompts were merged with the original structured code-practice records, completed with coding fields, and placed under the correct topics.

examples: Arrays, Matrices & 2D Arrays, Subarrays, and Prefix Sum are separate.
Strings and Character Encoding are separate.
Linear Search and Binary Search are separate.
Linked-list types and Fast & Slow Pointers are separate.
Stack, Queue, Deque, Circular Queue, and monotonic structures are separate.
Hashing, Hash Tables, and Collision Resolution are separate.
Each sorting algorithm has its own topic.
Two Pointers, Sliding Window, and Kadane's Algorithm are separate.
Tree, BST, Heap, Trie, and graph algorithms are separated.
